## What does this PR do?

A short description of the algorithm, data structure, or utility you added or
changed, and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Type hints added to every function signature
- [ ] Google-style docstring added to every function
- [ ] A matching test file was added under `tests/`
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally

Closes #___

## Anything else?

Notes for reviewers, questions you have, or things you're unsure about. It's
totally fine to ask questions here — that's what review is for!
